title: Groundnut Production in Central Asia and Caucasus Countries: Outlook for the future
abstract:
This book comprises Proceedings of a Workshop held at Tashkent, Uzbekistan, in Nov.
1999, organized jointly by ICRISAT and CGIAR-CAC Program Facilitation Unit, Tashkent,
Uzbekistan. Scientists from six countries of the Central Asia and Caucasus region
participated in the workshop. The first chapter discusses the groundnut and briefly
describes current groundnut research and development at ICRISAT. The next six
chapters document facts about the current status of groundnut production in these CAC
countries. The constraints and opportunities for expansion of groundnut production have
been listed. Spatial distribution of the crop in these countries on an ecoregional scale and
potential areas for expansion have been shown using maps developed on geographic
information systems. The final chapter is an overall synthesis, with suggested priorities
and future areas of research to enhance and stabilize groundnut yield and production in
the CAC region.
